5 Numbered Chapter
On hover
Let’s see an example of how it feels to
use a simple Potluck document. Below
is a simple recipe for making coffee,
which includes an interactive slider that
can scale up the number of servings.
The demo starts out as a video, but if
you click on it you can interact with a
live version.
This is an hovered sidenote! Look for
the highlighting of the note symbol.
